_comment: Paste each method into Convai → Character → External API → Add Method
_base_url: https://your-deployed-url.com (replace with your actual API URL)

methods.name: start_simulation
methods.description: Start a SimXLabs simulation run. Call this when the user asks to generate robot training data. Pass their request exactly as they described it.

parameters.name: user_intent
parameters.description: The user's plain-English description of the simulation task. Example: 'bin picking, 10000 demos, maximize trajectory diversity'

parameters.name: num_demos
parameters.description: Optional number of demonstrations. If not specified by the user, omit this field.

methods.name: check_run_status
methods.description: Check the current status and progress of a simulation run. Use this when the user asks for an update, or after waiting for a run to complete.

parameters.name: run_id
parameters.description: The run ID returned when the simulation was started. Example: 'A3F7B2'

methods.name: get_run_summary
methods.description: Get a completed run's full results and a human-readable summary. Only call this once the run status is 'completed'.

parameters.name: run_id
parameters.description: The run ID to get results for.
